translations: Allah has decreed for us He
[so] let the believers put (their) trust [so] let the believers put (their) trust
puzzle.hint: A foundational verse on tawakkul (reliance on Allah) — affirming that nothing reaches us except what He has decreed, so the believers place their trust in Him alone.
puzzle.arabic: قُل لَّن يُصِيبَنَآ إِلَّا مَا كَتَبَ ٱللَّهُ لَنَا هُوَ مَوْلَىٰنَا ۚ وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ
puzzle.verseEn: Say, "Never will we be struck except by what Allāh has decreed for us; He is our protector." And upon Allāh let the believers rely.
